message:
feat(syscall): add process/credential wrappers and migrate 13 syscalls

Add raw syscall wrappers for process/credential operations:
- getpgid, setpgid, getsid, setsid (process groups/sessions)
- setuid, setgid, setreuid, setregid (credentials)
- getgroups, setgroups (supplementary groups)

Migrate corresponding functions in unistd_abi to use native syscalls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
